text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fleetfoot Festival. I've come to
check on Gold City, who will be participating in a
performance, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's just tense from the responsibility
she's taking on. There has to be something I can
do to help her calm down, but what?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's really popping off this year. Too bad I won't be able
to see any of it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to go on stage. You understand I need
to concentrate, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you can walk around and see the festival
yourself, you're not a child.
choice_data_list:
I thought you'd be more familiar since it's an
Umamusume festival.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sure, that's true, but... No. I don't want to.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Stop it. No. I'm not going.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I underestimated your persistence.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: We don't have much time, so you decide.
choice_data_list: I want to see the sacred palanquin!
I want to see the festival from above!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The palanquin, huh? Sure, let's check it out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's humongous... I bet it would be a real pain to
lift.

text_block_list.name: Attendant Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Would you like to try it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh, isn't it sacred? You sure we can move it?

text_block_list.name: Attendant Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed an important shrine, but people are
still allowed to interact with it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh... Okay, guess I'll give it a little try.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmph! It's so heavy... Aaghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City tries lifting the palanquin with all her
might, but it doesn't budge.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Attendant Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Quite the challenge, isn't it? It takes dozens of
Umamusume to move it, so it would be impossible
for you alone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Can I... try again?

text_block_list.name: Attendant Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I just want one more try! ...Hrngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fired up by the challenge, Gold City continues to
try lifting the palanquin.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Hrrrnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Urgh! Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Attendant Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, City, I think maybe it's time to call it quits.
choice_data_list: Cool... It's my time to shine!
Cool... It's my time to shine!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What?! There's no way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like Gold City, I try lifting the palanquin with all
my might, but I can't move it one bit. After
multiple attempts...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? You seem dizzy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft, quit staring at me—you look ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I said don't look at me! Honestly, you should see
yourself, you're a wreck! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although this technically isn't part of my plan, I
manage to help Gold City calm her nerves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make the suggestion thinking a little distance
from the crowds will help ease the tension.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But aren't you here for the festival? Or are you,
like, bored already? That was quick.
choice_data_list: I want to see it from a distance!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Don't you normally save that for the end?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whatever, though... So, somewhere we can look
out over the festival...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Umm, isn't the festival over that way? We
might've come a bit too far.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The air is so different here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All right, what do you think? Here's the view you
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Very sophisticated answer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, spill it. What's the real reason you wanted
to come here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: There is another reason, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no reason to try and fool her at this point.
I decide to answer honestly.
choice_data_list: I wanted you to get some space.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why?
choice_data_list: You seemed really nervous back there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure... I was feeling tense, but... you could've just
talked to me back there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I mean, I guess if you did I would just...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Listen. You're not smooth. In fact, you're pretty
weird.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I'm glad I could get some fresh air. I feel
refreshed somehow.
choice_data_list:
Now you can go back there, be yourself, and
have fun!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh, you don't have to tell me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll get the job done. You don't know half of what
I'm capable of.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll shine so bright, you'll be able to see me all the
way from here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Gold City puts on a spectacular
performance.
